title: (feat): Update the Pollinations App Submission Protocol
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: New rules of the garden
gist.blurb: We've updated the Pollinations App Submission Protocol (PASP). Check out the fresh guidelines before dropping your next masterpiece into the community showcase.
gist.summary: Updated the Pollinations App Submission Protocol documentation and issue templates to clarify the terms and process for community app submissions.
gist.impact: Developers looking to submit their apps for the Flower tier will experience a clearer, more streamlined submission process with updated guidelines.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a helpful guide or librarian, holding a scroll or rulebook (the protocol), standing next to a wooden community submission box overflowing with blooming flowers (representing the Flower tier).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, holding a small glowing scroll next to a wooden submission box overflowing with pixelated flowers. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
